name: CVR Energy, Inc.
description: CVR Energy, Inc. is a diversified holding company primarily engaged in the petroleum refining and nitrogen fertilizer manufacturing industries through its holdings in CVR Refining, LP and CVR Partners, LP. Headquartered in Sugar Land, Texas, the company operates petroleum refineries in Coffeyville, Kansas, and Wynnewood, Oklahoma, as well as nitrogen fertilizer plants in Coffeyville and East Dubuque, Illinois. CVR Energy focuses on producing high-quality transportation fuels and nitrogen fertilizer products to serve customers in the Great Plains and Midwestern United States.
